zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter於1523年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾查爾頓 哥吉拉 沙智時，他的父親Sir Thomas Reade29歲，母親Lady Anne Hoo28歲。他於1542年與Agnes在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年10月5日在英國英格蘭維爾爾波斯可姆享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Whealon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset and Dorset): variant of   Whedon  .

variants.name: Whedon
meanings: English: habitational name from Wheddon Farm and Wheddon Cross in Cutcombe (Somerset), or perhaps Wheadown Farm in Witheridge (Devon). The Somerset placename derives from Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + denu ‘valley’ or dūn ‘hill’. The Devon placename probably derives from Old English hwǣg ‘whey’, perhaps also meaning ‘sour land’, + dūn. Compare Wheadon .
History: Thomas Whedon came from Yorkshire, England, to New Haven, CT, in 1657, and later moved to Branford, CT.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter was born in 1523, in Charlton All Saints, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Reade, was 29 and his mother, Lady Anne Hoo, was 28. He married Agnes in 1542, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 5 October 1554, in Boscombe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

Il a épousé Agnes en 1542, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1554, à Boscombe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

ko.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 앨 세인츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Reade(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Hoo(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 보스코브에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: чарлтон алл сеинц, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter родился в 1523 г. в местности чарлтон алл сеинц, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Reade было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Hoo, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1542 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 октября 1554 г. в местности боскомб, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
